plugin.name: Privacy Shredder
plugin.description: Securely wipe files and directories by overwriting them multiple times before deletion.
title: Privacy Shredder
description: Permanently destroy sensitive files. Warning: Data deleted this way cannot be recovered even with specialized forensics software.
queue.label: Shredding Queue
passes.label: Overwriting Passes:
dialog.empty.title: Queue Empty
dialog.empty.body: Please add files or folders to shred first.
dialog.confirm.title: Final Warning
dialog.confirm.body: Are you absolutely sure? This will IRREVERSIBLY destroy {count} items. This cannot be undone.
log.start: Starting secure shredding of {count} items with {passes} passes...
